headline: Intuitive Expands Investment and Footprint in Europe
summary: Company begins direct operations in Italy, Spain, Portugal, Malta, San Marino, and associated territoriesSUNNYVALE, Calif., March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Intuitive (NASDAQ:ISRG), a global technology leader in minimally invasive care and the pioneer of robotic-assisted surgery, today announced the completion of its acquisition of the da Vinci and Ion distribution business operated by ab medica, Abex, Excelencia Robótica, and their affiliates.
